title: KASU 5 Pack Poncho Waterproof, Thick Disposable Rain Poncho for Adult - Pac a Mac with Drawstring Hood for Outdoor Recreation, Festivals, Camping, Hiking
features: Extra thick – 100% waterproof, 30% extra thicker, a poncho which won't stick you, but a thin one does.
Lite Package - Each poncho Packed individually it's in own bag, you can put it in your pants pocket, handbag
Suitable For Multi Activities - You will never be unprepared for the sudden rain shower. Perfect for amusement parks, camping, hiking, tailgating, and any other occasions.
One Size Fit All - Disposable poncho with attached hood, it's a perfect emergency kit suitable for both adult and youth, men and women, girls and boys.
description: Product Description Consider the humble rain poncho. Whether you're heading to a concert, taking a family trip to Disneyland, fishing, or watching a football game, a rain poncho is an essential item to keep on hand. This simple yet versatile garment ensures that you can continue enjoying your favorite outdoor activities regardless of the weather. we believe in combining quality, high performance, and style in all our outdoor products. Unlike the many cheap and low-quality rain ponchos available, our highly sought-after rain poncho set is crafted with exceptional quality and unique design, making it the perfect companion for any rainy day adventure. Thicker than all other rain ponchos Our rain poncho is made of 0.035 thick PE and are the thickest rain ponchos you will find and still fit in your bag. Breathable rain poncho The design prevents the sauna effect. While you wear it, air can still circulate. Best design for all seasons Easy to carry The compact packaging allows you to have the poncho with you in any situation. Ideal for concerts, theme parks, hiking or any other outdoor activity. The size of a packed poncho is 15 cm x 10 cm One size fits all The poncho for adults is 127 cm x 102 cm. The poncho for children is 102 cm x 76 cm. It also fits large people, even when they carry a backpack
